rulings.Case Title: LUIS HEATH VS. FELL STREET PARTNERS LP et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 30, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANT KEITH GOODMAN, GRM PROPERTIES, LLC and ANDRE FERRIGNO's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to July 28, 2015 for moving party to provide courtesy copy of the moving papers and the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than July 2, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court is in receipt of courtesy copies of opposition and reply papers. = (501/REQ)
